summary: Super‑clean soundboard capture of an otherwise solid show, highlighted by Phil’s standout backing vocals.
review: Listeners rave about the crystal‑clear, crisp sound of this soundboard recording, noting the excellent vocal‑instrument balance and a pleasant room ambience. While specific song moments are not called out, reviewers do single out Phil Lesh’s backing vocals as a highlight that adds extra flavor to the performance.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high praise for recording clarity and overall show enjoyment, though limited detail on musical performance keeps confidence at a medium level.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Super clean, very crisp audio with vocals mixed well; reviewers describe it as ‘crispy’ and note good room ambience. Possible matrix source but soundboard quality dominates.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific set‑list commentary provided; reviewers generally view the show as solid.

band_member_comments.Phil: Backing vocals praised as a key element that elevates the performance.
